summary: Verified on the latest realistic origin/main at `b980bb92e62c10c21678317120b07ef0ae98dea9` that ADR 0336's public-entrypoint leakage validator is still implemented after ADR 0337 advanced mainline, refreshed the exact-main archive evidence, and confirmed that the rebased tree passes validator, focused test, model, receipt, and generated-doc checks while the remote-wrapper path still falls back locally and the terminal archived branch no longer owns `workstream-surfaces`.

verification.check: Exact-main validator and focused regression coverage
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/validate_public_entrypoints.py --check` passed and the focused pytest slice for `tests/test_validate_public_entrypoints.py`, `tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py`, and `tests/test_generate_discovery_artifacts.py` returned `27 passed in 1.50s`.

On the rebased exact-main tree, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs`, `uv run --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed. `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces generated-docs` now fails only because `ws-0336` has already been archived out of the active registry, and that expected terminal-history ownership failure is preserved as explicit evidence instead of being treated as an ADR regression.

The final `make pre-push-gate` replay is run from detached `HEAD` on the finished archive commit so the gate does not falsely select the terminal `codex/ws-0336-live-apply` branch for active-branch ownership validation.

`make remote-validate` exercised the remote-wrapper path, reported `remote command failed, falling back locally`, and then passed `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `atlas-lint`, `dependency-graph`, `iac-policy-scan`, `policy-validation`, and `type-check`, while `workstream-surfaces` failed because the branch now maps to terminal history and `ansible-syntax` plus `schema-validation` timed out after `901.21s` and `601.47s`; this is preserved as runner evidence rather than treated as an ADR 0336 validator regression.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, `0 workstreams in progress`, and a blocked release cut because three unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain open through `2026-04-06`.

notes: ADR 0336 is repository-only; the platform-version field remains not applicable and no live host mutation was required for this closeout.

The branch deliberately kept `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` untouched; `README.md` only changed later during the mainline archive closeout when canonical truth refreshed the merged-workstream history.
